name: Sloppy Joes (Low-fat Way)
recipeIngredient: 1 package The Turkey Store Extra Lean Ground Breast (1.5 lbs.)
1 can (16 oz.) No salt-added tomato sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large skillet with non-stick cooking spray and heat over medium-high heat for about 30 seconds.
2. Crumble the extra lean ground turkey breast into the skillet.
3. Add onion, green pepper, and celery to the skillet. Cook and stir for 3 to 5 minutes or until the turkey is lightly browned and vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in tomato sauce, white vinegar, brown sugar, and mustard.
5. Reduce heat to low. Cook for 25 to 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until most of the liquid has absorbed.
6. Serve on hamburger buns. Makes 6 servings.
